meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Master Code Fixes for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn to debug with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver faster, cleaner code for your freelance clients today.
content.answer_block: Stop burning billable hours chasing elusive bugs. By integrating AI-assisted debugging into your workflow, you move from manual tracing to automated root-cause analysis. Use Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for surgical CLI-based fixes. This workflow cuts debugging time by 70%, allowing you to ship high-quality features faster.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your codebase has hit a wall. You've been staring at a silent error log for two hours, and the frustration is starting to bleed into your creative flow. For a freelancer, this isn't just a technical glitch; it's a direct hit to your bottom line and your professional reputation.

But the era of manual print-statement debugging is over. By leveraging the cognitive power of AI, you can transform these bottlenecks into trivial tasks. It's time to stop guessing and start engineering with precision, using advanced tools that understand your stack better than the documentation itself.

steps.title: Contextualize the Environment
steps.description: Before debugging, you must provide the AI with the specific environment state and dependency tree to prevent hallucinated solutions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory and identify the dependency tree. Map the primary runtime environment variables and suggest potential points of failure for this stack.

steps.title: Isolate the Error Trace
steps.description: Feed the stack trace directly into your tool to narrow the search radius to the specific module causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: I am getting a runtime error in [Module Name]. Here is the stack trace: [Paste Trace]. Identify the exact line of code where the logic breaks.

steps.title: Generate Defensive Patches
steps.description: Create a fix that not only solves the current issue but adds guardrails to prevent regressions during future deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a defensive coding patch for this function. Ensure it includes input validation and error handling that prevents similar edge-case failures.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --instruction 'fix the logical error in the loop and add try-catch blocks'

steps.title: Automated Unit Verification
steps.description: Verify the fix by generating a targeted unit test that replicates the bug scenario and confirms the resolution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test suite for this module that specifically targets the bug we just fixed. Ensure it covers the edge case that caused the failure.

steps.title: Final Integration and Cleanup
steps.description: Apply the changes and perform a final cleanup of logs or temporary variables introduced during the debugging process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the updated codebase for any redundant code or lingering debugging artifacts. Refactor for performance optimization.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'fix: resolve runtime error in core module'

pro_tips: Always use the '--read-only' flag in Claude Code when exploring legacy codebases to ensure you don't accidentally alter critical logic before understanding the architecture.
Store your most effective 'Debugging System Prompts' in a local markdown file to quickly inject project context into Antigravity.
When debugging async issues, explicitly ask the AI to map the event loop and promise chains to visualize data flow.
Use the 'diff' output from Claude Code to manually audit changes; never blindly accept a multi-file refactor without a glance.
If the AI provides a complex fix, ask it to explain the 'why' behind the change to ensure you maintain complete technical ownership for your client.
content.next_steps: Integrate these debugging workflows into your CI/CD pipeline to automate error detection before code even reaches the staging environment.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs define your freelance career. Master the tools that turn hours of troubleshooting into minutes of high-velocity development. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
